# Speech AI - Complete Documentation Index

**Version**: 1.0.0  
**Release Date**: July 2, 2026  
**Generated by**: Manus AI - Contexto Global Lab  

---

## 📚 Documentation Overview

This comprehensive documentation suite provides everything needed to understand, develop, deploy, and operate the Speech AI Text-to-Audio platform. The documentation is organized into four strategic packs, each serving a specific audience.

---

## 📦 Pack 1: Foundation (Getting Started)

Essential documents for understanding the system architecture and capabilities.

| Document | Purpose | Audience |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| [README.md](Foundation/README.md) | Project overview and quick start guide | Everyone |
| [ENGINEERING_DOCUMENTATION.md](Foundation/ENGINEERING_DOCUMENTATION.md) | Technical system components and design | Architects, Senior Engineers |
| [ARCHITECTURE.md](Foundation/ARCHITECTURE.md) | High-level architectural patterns and data flow | Architects, Tech Leads |
| [DIAGRAMS.md](Foundation/DIAGRAMS.md) | Index of all architectural diagrams | Everyone |

## 🚀 Quick Navigation

### For New Developers
1. Start with [README.md](Foundation/README.md)
2. Review [ARCHITECTURE.md](Foundation/ARCHITECTURE.md) for system overview
3. Follow [DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md](Developer/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md) for local setup
4. Check [CODING_STANDARDS.md](Developer/CODING_STANDARDS.md) before writing code

### For DevOps/Operations
1. Read [OPERATIONS_GUIDE.md](Operations/OPERATIONS_GUIDE.md) for deployment
2. Review [SECURITY.md](Operations/SECURITY.md) for security requirements
3. Monitor using [PROJECT_METRICS.md](Operations/PROJECT_METRICS.md)
4. Follow [RELEASE_PROCESS.md](Operations/RELEASE_PROCESS.md) for deployments

### For Architects/Tech Leads
1. Review [ENGINEERING_DOCUMENTATION.md](Foundation/ENGINEERING_DOCUMENTATION.md)
2. Study [ARCHITECTURE.md](Foundation/ARCHITECTURE.md) and diagrams
3. Examine [ADR.md](Sprint/ADR.md) for past decisions
4. Plan future work using [ROADMAP.md](Sprint/ROADMAP.md)

---

## 📊 Project Metrics (Sprint 9)

- **Codebase Size**: ~4,289 lines of Python across 44 files
- **Architecture Pattern**: Pipes & Filters with Layered Architecture
- **Supported Languages**: English, Portuguese, Spanish
- **Current TTS Provider**: Microsoft Edge TTS
- **Planned Providers**: Azure, OpenAI, AWS Polly, ElevenLabs

---
